inspection_target: Finite rays hit the chart; infinity rays lie in w=0 and do not hit it.
representation: 3D rays meeting the w=1 affine chart
validation: finite representatives project to w=1; infinity representatives have w=0

inspection_target: A point invisible in the w-chart can be visible in another chart.
representation: two affine charts of the same projective classes
validation: chart coordinates reconstruct projectively equivalent representatives

inspection_target: The finite location diverges while the scaled homogeneous vector converges.
representation: limit of p + alpha r under homogeneous rescaling
validation: limit residual decreases and final coordinate tends to zero

concept: Joins and meets via cross product
inspection_target: The same meet formula returns a finite point or a point at infinity.
representation: ordinary and parallel intersections computed by cross products
validation: cross products are orthogonal to both inputs

concept: Parallelism after choosing a line at infinity
inspection_target: Changing the infinity line changes what the word parallel means.
representation: quadrangle construction with a finite line declared to be infinity
validation: constructed lines pass through the center and the selected infinity points

inspection_target: Six joins of four points dualize to six meets of four lines.
representation: complete quadrangle and coordinate-dual line arrangement
validation: incidence counts agree after swapping roles

inspection_target: Lines remain lines while distances, angles, and circles need not survive.
representation: interactive grid and circle image under a four-corner homography
validation: point images match four targets and line action preserves incidence

inspection_target: Every row and column has q+1 hits; any two points determine one line.
representation: incidence matrices for GF(2) and GF(3)
validation: counts and uniqueness axioms hold modulo q
